title: Shingeki no Craft Official Modpack
description: Attack on Titan in Minecraft! Shingeki no Craft: Official Modpack!
body:
Bring the Titans! A new Minecraft Adventure

Welcome to the world of Shingeki no Craft, where the awe of Attack on Titan blends with the creative universe of Minecraft. Designed with both newbies and veterans in mind, this modpack is your gateway to a fully immersive experience, replete with the epic essence of the acclaimed anime.

What's included in the Modpack?

Dive into The Barracks, a custom map created by Rifleman and Fanfo. A fully interactive tutorial that goals to guide new players through the basics of the project. Like using ODM gear, crafting the iconic uniform, fighting against Titans, and even experimenting with unique drinks!

Click here to Download the map!

The heart of the modpack is the seamless integration of Shingeki no Craft, engineered to optimize gameplay and enhance multiplayer interactions. Since the closure of the official server, the aim has been to recreate the cherished community feel. Hence, the inclusion of the Essentials mod which provides a smooth local multiplayer experience without the need for a server – perfect to enjoy with a circle of 4-5 friends using a robust host PC.

Better Shingeki no Craft

Apart from core gameplay, you can expect aesthetic enhancements including a fresh resource pack changing the main menu backdrop and a handy Discord Overlay for seamless communication.

Please note, while the datapack may not be updated as frequently, you're ensured a stable version with incremental updates for new and experimental mechanics. Keep an eye out for updates following Mojang's content releases, which might bring the modpack's version to 1.20.5 or even higher!

Ready for Your Adventure?
